The '''008 Heavy Landspeeder''' was a combat [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]] employed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Characteristics==
Fast and maneuverable, the 008 heavy [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]] was a useful addition to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] arsenal. However, the 008 suffered one design flaw that was detrimental in battle: simultaneous firing of all its weapons caused the craft to become unstable. This was believed to be due to the twin aft [[Laser cannon/Legends|cannons]]—which lacked the excellent microtronics of the forward counterparts—being forced to divert power from the [[Lateral control|lateral stabilizers]].

Each speeder was eight [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in length, with a minimum crew of one [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and one [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]]. Standard armament included two rear-mounted fire-linked medium [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] and a forward fire-linked double laser cannon. Speeds of 315 [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] per hour were possible and the landspeeder had a flight ceiling of three [[Meter/Legends|meters]].

==History==
As of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] the 008 heavy landspeeder was a new acquisition for the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] and was still undergoing test deployments on [[Planet/Legends|planets]] including [[Goroth Prime/Legends|Goroth Prime]]. There it quickly became a favorite of their pilots. Being a combat design the 008 heavy landspeeder was sold exclusively to militaries, namely the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] but, as with many kinds of technology, there were less-than-legal means of purchasing them.
